title: rubus rubellus var. callichrous
intro: Rubus rubellus var. callichrous is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rubus rubellus plant, commonly known as the 'fairy ring chanterelle' or ' witches' butter', which is a type of fungus that grows in clusters and is characterized by its bright orange to yellowish color. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating infections and wounds. The health benefits of Rubus rubellus var. callichrous include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and infusing the fruiting bodies, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
